provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the National Security (Classified Matters) Notice.

All documents including letters, and the contents of all documents including letters— (a) addressed by or on behalf of the Government of the United Republic or any specified authority; or (b) prepared by or on behalf of the Government of the United Republic or a specified authority; or (c) addressed to the Government or any officer of the Government in his official capacity or a specified authority or any officer of a specified authority in his official capacity, and which are marked or stamped with the word "confidential" or "secret" or "top secret" are hereby declared to be classified matters for the purpose of the National Security Act 1 . 1 Cap. 47 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
